title: The Distance That The Dead Have Gone
content:
The distance that the dead have gone
    Does not at first appear;
    Their coming back seems possible
    For many an ardent year.

    And then, that we have followed them
    We more than half suspect,
    So intimate have we become
    With their dear retrospect.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Emily Elizabeth Dickinson, titled "The Distance That The Dead Have Gone", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
